sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Shimmick (SHIM) Price Target Increased by 50.00% to 4.59
feed.summary: Shimmick's (SHIM) average one-year price target has been raised by 50.00% to $4.59 per share, up from $3.06, according to analyst estimates. This new target represents a 23.06% increase from the last closing price of $3.73. Institutional ownership data shows 24 funds holding positions in Shimmick, with some firms like Pacific Ridge Capital Partners increasing their portfolio allocation despite a decrease in total institutional shares owned.

feed.title: 374Water Inc Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Listing Requirement
feed.summary: 374Water Inc. announced on January 14, 2026, that it has regained compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule. The company met the $1.00 bid price requirement by maintaining it for ten consecutive business days. This development ensures its stock will continue trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market, following an initial non-compliance notice received in January 2025.

feed.title: CALAVO GROWERS INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Calavo Growers, Inc. (CVGW) released its Form 10-K report for fiscal year 2025, detailing financial performance, operational highlights, and strategic initiatives. Despite a 2% decrease in net sales to $648.4 million, the company reported a significant increase in net income from continuing operations to $20.0 million, driven by improved operational efficiency and cost management, particularly in the Prepared segment. The report also highlights challenges such as an FDA detention hold on avocado imports and regulatory changes impacting tomato sales, alongside strategic moves like the sale of its Fresh Cut Business and a proposed merger with Mission Produce, Inc.

feed.title: Feb. 19 call to unpack Coeur Mining's 2025 results for investors in-depth
feed.summary: Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE: CDE) announced it will report its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 operational and financial results after the New York Stock Exchange closes on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. The company will host a conference call on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time, featuring its Chairman, President, and CEO, Mitchell J. Krebs, along with other key members of management. A replay of the call will be available until February 26, 2026.

feed.title: MKS Instruments Garners Optimistic Price Forecast Amid AI Boom
feed.summary: MKS Instruments (NASDAQ: MKSI) has received optimistic price forecasts from several financial analysts, including Mizuho, BofA, Cantor Fitzgerald, and CFRA, driven by potential growth in the AI infrastructure and semiconductor sectors. The company's stock has seen a nearly 10% increase, reflecting strong financial performance, effective capital management, and robust cash flow. Analysts anticipate sustained upward momentum for MKS Instruments as AI technologies continue to reshape the market and drive demand for its cutting-edge solutions.

feed.title: Leggett & Platt stock reaches 52-week high at $12.03 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Leggett & Platt stock hit a 52-week high of $12.03, reflecting a 22.2% one-year change and strong investor confidence. This comes despite recent news of the company missing Q3 2025 earnings and revenue forecasts, an all-stock acquisition proposal from Somnigroup International, and the board approving retention agreements for executives. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.05 per share.

feed.title: Devon Energy Corp. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corp. (DVN) shares fell 4.22% on Thursday, closing at $36.32, despite a generally positive trading session for the broader stock market. The S&P 500 Index and the Dow Jones Industrial Average both saw gains. This decline broke a two-day winning streak for Devon Energy Corp.

feed.title: SEI Investments Extends CEO Ryan Hicke’s Employment Agreement
feed.summary: SEI Investments (SEIC) has extended CEO Ryan Hicke's employment agreement through June 1, 2031, replacing his previous contract. The new agreement includes an annual base salary of $900,000, a target cash bonus of $2.7 million, and eligibility for annual equity grants. It also provides substantial severance protections and non-compete clauses, reinforcing leadership continuity and stability.

feed.title: SunCoke Energy names Shantanu Agrawal as new CFO effective March 2026
feed.summary: SunCoke Energy (NYSE:SXC) has announced that Shantanu Agrawal, current Vice President of Finance and Treasurer, will become the new CFO effective March 13, 2026, following Mark W. Marinko's retirement. The company emphasized Agrawal's extensive experience and deep knowledge of SunCoke's business. SunCoke Energy, trading at $8.25, has shown a strong year-to-date return of 14% and a significant dividend yield of 5.85%, and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro.

feed.title: Texas Instruments declares quarterly dividend of $1.42 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.42 per share, yielding 2.94% based on its current share price. The company has a strong dividend history, maintaining payments for 55 consecutive years and increasing them for 22 years. This announcement follows recent financial guidance and product developments, including new automotive semiconductors.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Fourth-Quarter Revenue Falls on Lower Intermodal Sales
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services reported a decline in fourth-quarter revenue, primarily due to lower transcontinental load volumes. Despite the revenue fall, the company's profit increased to $181.1 million, or $1.90 a share, surpassing analyst expectations. The logistics company's quarterly revenue decreased by 2% to $3.10 billion.

feed.title: PDD Sees Unusually Large Options Volume (NASDAQ:PDD)
feed.summary: PDD Holdings Inc. experienced unusually large options trading volume on Thursday, with 137,643 put options purchased, an 83% increase over the daily average. This comes as institutional investors, including Allspring Global Investments, significantly adjusted their stakes in the company. PDD currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $139.25.

feed.title: Dollar Tree’s Viral Valentine’s Day Trees Are Back—But Probably Not for Long
feed.summary: Dollar Tree has brought back its popular 18-inch Valentine's Day trees in red and pink for just $1.50, which quickly went viral last year on TikTok. Shoppers are eager to get their hands on these decorations, as they are not available for shipping and are expected to sell out fast in stores. Given their high demand, several alternative mini trees are suggested from Amazon for those who miss out.

feed.title: United Rentals to Hold Q4 2025 Earnings Call on January 29, 2026
feed.summary: United Rentals will host its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings call on January 29, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET, following the release of its detailed financial results after market close on January 28, 2026. The call will feature CEO Matt Flannery and CFO Ted Grace, providing insights into the company's performance. United Rentals, the world's largest equipment rental company, has received varied analyst ratings, with an average 1-year price target of $1032.

feed.title: Halliburton (HAL) Appoints New President for Western Hemisphere
feed.summary: Halliburton Company (HAL) has appointed Michael Casey Maxwell as President of its Western Hemisphere operations, effective February 1, 2026. Maxwell, with nearly two decades at Halliburton, previously served as Senior Vice President, North America Land. His compensation package will include an annual base salary of $800,000, along with participation in various incentive plans.

feed.title: Vistra Corp. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Vistra Corp.'s stock (VST) rose on a strong trading day, outperforming its competitors and the broader market. Despite closing below its 52-week high, the company's shares gained 2.19%, while the S&P 500 declined. This positive movement suggests a favorable trading sentiment for Vistra among investors.

feed.title: Amgen Teases Phase 2 Results for MariTide, Its Weight-Loss Drug
feed.summary: Amgen has released promising Phase 2 study results for its obesity drug, MariTide. The biotech firm indicated that the drug shows potential for less frequent dosing, which could be a significant advantage in the weight-loss market. Details of the study were disclosed, suggesting a positive outlook for the drug's development.

feed.title: PainReform Rebrands as PRF Technologies to Reflect Expansion into Healthcare and AI-Driven Energy
feed.summary: PainReform has officially rebranded as PRF Technologies Ltd. to signify its expansion beyond a single drug into diverse healthcare and AI-driven energy sectors, following shareholder approval on January 6, 2026. The company's broadened portfolio now includes LayerBio's ocular therapy and the DeepSolar AI-based solar analytics business, aiming to pursue multiple growth paths in specialty pharmaceuticals and renewable energy. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates PRFX as Neutral due to weak financial performance and technical downtrends, despite some oversold indicators.

feed.title: Is Deere's (DE) Layoff Wave Reframing Its Precision-Tech Margin Story?
feed.summary: Deere has initiated significant layoffs across its U.S. factories due to weakened agricultural demand from lower crop prices and high production costs for farmers. Despite these near-term challenges, the company is a key player in growing precision technology sectors like precision forestry and advanced automation. This article explores how these workforce reductions and broader agricultural headwinds will impact Deere's investment narrative, which relies on technology-led margin improvements to offset cyclical pressures.

feed.title: Invesco Mortgage estimates book value increased at least 6% since Q3 (IVR:NYSE)
feed.summary: Invesco Mortgage Capital (IVR) disclosed that its estimated book value per common share as of January 12, 2026, ranged from $8.94 to $9.30. This represents an increase of 6.3% to 10.6% compared to its book value on September 30, 2025. The company announced this on Thursday, indicating significant growth.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. (SMCI) stock rose 4.07% to $29.42 on Thursday, outperforming the broader market indices like the S&P 500 Index and the Dow Jones Industrial Average, which also saw gains. This increase ended a three-day losing streak for the company. The positive trading day for Super Micro Computer Inc. contributed to an overall strong session for the stock market.

feed.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Declares Monthly Dividend at $0.12 a Share; Payable Feb. 13 to Holders of Record Jan. 26
feed.summary: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. announced a monthly dividend of $0.12 per share, which will be payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 26, 2026. This declaration follows a previous move in December where the company raised its quarterly dividend and shifted to monthly payouts. The company, trading under the symbol IVR, specializes in investing in mortgage-backed securities and other related assets.

feed.title: SunCoke Energy, Inc. Announces Executive Leadership Succession: Shantanu Agrawal to Succeed Mark W. Marinko as Chief Financial Officer in March 2026
feed.summary: SunCoke Energy, Inc. announced that Mark W. Marinko will retire as Chief Financial Officer on March 13, 2026. Shantanu Agrawal, currently Vice President, Finance and Treasurer, has been unanimously appointed by the Board to succeed Marinko as CFO, effective the same date. Agrawal has over a decade of experience with SunCoke, leading various finance and treasury functions.

feed.title: U.S. court upholds $194M trade secrets award to DXC in tech dispute
feed.summary: The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit affirmed an award of approximately $194 million to DXC Technology's subsidiary, CSC, against Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) for trade secret misappropriation. The court upheld over $100 million in punitive damages, citing TCS's willful, malicious, and deceitful conduct. DXC views this ruling, stemming from a six-year legal pursuit, as a validation of its commitment to protecting intellectual property and upholding ethical business practices.

feed.title: AXTI: AI-driven demand is doubling indium phosphide needs, with capacity and market share set to rise
feed.summary: AI-driven data center growth is accelerating the demand for indium phosphide, with AXT Inc. (AXTI) expecting its capacity to double by 2026. Despite risks from export controls in China, AXTI's vertical integration and global customer base position it for increased market share as application and demand expand. This information is based on an AI-generated summary of AXT Inc.'s 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference Virtual Audio Transcript from January 14, 2026.

feed.title: Penske Automotive Group, Inc. (PAG): A Bull Case Theory
feed.summary: This article summarizes a bullish thesis on Penske Automotive Group, Inc. (PAG) from TJ Terwilliger, highlighting the company's strong position as one of the world's largest automotive retailers. The analysis emphasizes Penske's durable competitive advantages, including state laws limiting competition for dealerships, and its significant recurring revenue streams from high-margin service and parts departments. These factors are presented as key drivers for long-term value creation and stable financial performance, making PAG a compelling investment opportunity despite its stock price remaining flat since previous coverage.

feed.title: Erasca (ERAS) Price Target Increased by 30.91% to 6.53
feed.summary: The average one-year price target for Erasca (NasdaqGS:ERAS) has been increased by 30.91% to $6.53 per share, up from $4.99. This revised target represents a 13.02% decrease from the latest closing price of $7.50. Institutional ownership of Erasca has seen a slight decrease in the last quarter, yet the put/call ratio of 0.04 indicates a bullish sentiment among investors.

feed.title: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) is expected to show year-over-year earnings growth on higher revenues for the quarter ending December 2025, with an earnings report anticipated on January 22. The company has a Zacks Earnings ESP of +0.36% and a Zacks Rank of #3, suggesting a strong likelihood of beating the consensus EPS estimate of $2.37. Truist Financial Corporation (TFC), another regional bank, is also projected to beat its EPS estimates for the same period.

feed.title: CFRA Downgrades HP, Inc. (HPQ) to Sell
feed.summary: CFRA has downgraded its rating for HP, Inc. (HPQ) from Hold to Sell. The article provides this key analyst action without further details, as the remaining content is locked for premium subscribers.

feed.title: Pike Township residents get more answers about proposed data center
feed.summary: American Tower representatives provided details and answered questions from residents and elected officials at a Pike Township Residents Association meeting regarding their proposed 20,000-square-foot data center. Residents expressed concerns about the center's location, environmental impact, and electricity usage, while company officials clarified that it would not use tax incentives and would only build one data center on the site. The rezoning petition is scheduled for a hearing on February 12th.

feed.title: Eager, S&P Global Mobility president, buys $11917 in SPGI stock
feed.summary: William W. Eager, President of S&P Global Mobility, recently purchased shares of S&P Global Inc. (NYSE:SPGI) totaling $11,917 across two transactions in late 2025. These insider stock purchases occur amidst other significant company developments including a dividend increase, the sale of certain business units, and the launch of a new automotive data platform. Analysts at Stifel also reiterated a Buy rating on SPGI, forecasting strong debt issuance in 2026.

feed.title: Why is KLA Corporation (KLAC) stock soaring today

feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) announced its quarterly earnings, reporting $1.90 EPS, surpassing consensus estimates by $0.14. Shares saw a slight increase, trading at $206.52, and the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with various firms adjusting price targets. Insider activity showed sales totaling over $2.68 million in the last quarter, while the company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.44.

feed.title: Texas Instruments board declares first quarter 2026 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Texas Instruments Incorporated (Nasdaq: TXN) announced that its board of directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.42 per share. This dividend is payable on February 10, 2026, to stockholders of record as of January 30, 2026. The company is a global semiconductor manufacturer specializing in analog and embedded processing chips for various markets.

feed.summary: Texas Instruments announced that its board of directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.42 per share. This dividend is payable on February 10 to shareholders of record as of January 30. The company continues its regular dividend payouts.

feed.title: General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) Reaches New 12-Month High - Here's Why
feed.summary: General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) shares hit a new 52-week high of $367.66 on Thursday, closing at $366.00, driven by strong earnings, positive analyst ratings, and dividend declarations. The company, a major aerospace and defense contractor, reported Q3 EPS of $3.88, beating estimates, and boosted its FY 2025 guidance. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $360.95.

feed.title: Rapid7 to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on February 10
feed.summary: Rapid7, Inc. (NASDAQ: RPD) announced it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, after market close. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results and business outlook. Interested parties can register for the live event and access the webcast on Rapid7's investor relations website.

feed.title: United Rentals, Inc. Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Conference Call and Audio Webcast Thursday, January 29, 2026 at 8:30 a.m. (ET)
feed.summary: United Rentals, Inc. announced it will host its fourth quarter and full year 2025 conference call and audio webcast on Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. CEO Matt Flannery and CFO Ted Grace will lead the call, which will be accessible via live audio webcast on unitedrentals.com or by phone. The company's fourth quarter and full year 2025 press release will be issued on Wednesday, January 28, 2026, after market close.

feed.title: Rapid7 to Announce Q4 and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on February 10, 2026
feed.summary: Rapid7, Inc. (NASDAQ: RPD) will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on February 10, 2026, after market close, followed by a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The company, which specializes in cybersecurity and serves over 11,000 customers globally, will make the results and webcast available through its investor relations website. The article also provides recent insider trading activity, hedge fund movements, and analyst ratings for RPD.

feed.title: KEYCORP DECLARES QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND ON COMMON SHARES AND PREFERRED STOCKS; SETS ANNUAL MEETING DATE
feed.summary: KeyCorp announced that its Board of Directors has declared quarterly cash dividends for both common shares and several series of preferred stocks. The dividends are payable in March 2026, with varying record dates. Additionally, KeyCorp set the date for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders for Thursday, May 14, 2026.

feed.title: Disney at CES 2026: Building Worlds Big and Small
feed.summary: At CES 2026, Disney showcased its innovation in immersive storytelling, highlighting collaborations with LEGO for interactive play and Haddy for large-scale 3D printing. The company introduced LEGO Smart Play, which integrates Star Wars storytelling with physical and digital play, and demonstrated Haddy's MicroFactory in producing a 3D-printed canoe for Disneyland's Jungle Cruise. These initiatives exemplify Disney's strategy of uniting technology and creativity to build engaging experiences across various scales, from miniature toys to theme park attractions.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $1,180,000 of HP INC lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: HP INC (HPQ) disclosed $1,180,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, covering issues such as digital equity, semiconductor policies, additive manufacturing, and artificial intelligence. The article also details recent insider trading activity with significant sales by top executives, and institutional investor movements, showing both increased and decreased positions. Analyst ratings and price targets for HPQ are also provided, with a median target of $25.0 from 11 analysts.

feed.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. Announces Monthly Common Dividend and Provides Update on Book Value and Leverage
feed.summary: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. declared a cash dividend of $0.12 per common share for January 2026, payable on February 13, 2026. The company also provided estimated book value per common share in the range of $8.94 to $9.30, and projected debt-to-equity and economic debt-to-equity ratios of 6.5x and 6.9x, respectively, as of January 12, 2026. These financial figures are preliminary and subject to change.

feed.title: 100,000 cancer patient profiles power SOPHiA GENETICS' new data network
feed.summary: SOPHiA GENETICS announced that several world-renowned healthcare organizations, including Exactis Innovation, Institut Paoli-Calmettes, and Gemelli Hospital, have joined SOPHiA UNITY, its global collective intelligence network. This network now includes over 100,000 cancer patient profiles with multimodal data from three countries, aiming to accelerate precision oncology research and care. The initiative uses AI-driven technology to harmonize diverse data, enabling leading institutions to collaborate on innovative projects and leverage real-world data for breakthroughs in cancer treatment.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $410,000 of GENERAL MILLS SERVICES INC. (FKA GENERAL MILLS) lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: GENERAL MILLS SERVICES INC. (fka GENERAL MILLS) disclosed $410,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, covering issues such as USDA programs, the Farm Bill, pet food regulation, and recycling infrastructure. The disclosure comes amid recent congressional stock trading by representatives Gilbert Ray Cisneros Jr. and Dan Newhouse, insider sales from executives, and diverse institutional investor activity in GIS stock. Analyst ratings are predominantly "Sell" or "Underweight," with a median price target of $48.0 from ten analysts.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $220,000 of BEST BUY CO INC lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: BEST BUY CO INC (BBY) disclosed $220,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, covering diverse issues such as corporate taxes, trade with China, mental health coverage, and combating organized retail crime. The article also provides insights into recent insider trading, hedge fund activity, and analyst ratings for BBY, indicating a mix of sales by insiders and varied institutional investor sentiment. Wall Street analysts show a generally positive outlook with a median price target of $82.0.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $90,000 of QUALCOMM INC. lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: QUALCOMM INC. (QCOM) recently disclosed $90,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, focusing on trade, telecommunications, and the U.S. semiconductor industry. The article also details congressional stock trading activity for QCOM, insider trading where executives primarily sold shares, and hedge fund movements with both increases and decreases in QCOM holdings. Wall Street analysts have issued positive ratings and price targets, with a median target of $192.5.

feed.title: Run Oracle databases inside AWS, Azure and Google Cloud data centers
feed.summary: Oracle announced an expansion of its multicloud capabilities, allowing Oracle Database services running on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) to be deployed directly within AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure data centers. This initiative, including offerings like Oracle Database@AWS, Oracle Database@Azure, and Oracle Database@Google Cloud, aims to simplify cloud migration, offer unified administration, and provide flexible purchasing options for customers. Oracle plans further global expansion to meet the growing demand for its database services across multiple cloud environments.

feed.title: JPMorgan Deal Cuts Software Firm Relativity’s Private Debt Costs
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is leading a refinancing effort for legal software firm Relativity ODA LLC, enabling the Silver Lake Management-backed company to reduce borrowing costs on its existing private debt. The deal lowered the interest rate on a $720 million first-lien term loan to 2.75 percentage points over the benchmark. This move highlights a trend of public market investors impacting private lending.
